text: [Music]
many women wonder what type of girls men

will show you the definition of a good

psychological studies showcase that
there are four categories of women that
seem to bring out the best in men the
femina The Islander the Regal and the

of each archetype within themselves with
one taking precedent over the others one
the femina the femina always looks as if
she has a daily stylist she since she's
fashionable classy and loves the Finer
Things in life she portrays confidence
friendliness vulnerability
and a sweet Touch of femininity her
irresistible charm makes her easily
desirable to men two famous femina women
are Princess Diana and hi Berry men are
attracted to the femina because she

her style and Beauty they are visual and
they admire a woman who can externally
take care of herself better yet a femina
doesn't dress in accordance to win the

to satisfy herself
bring out your femina by accentuating
your beautiful physical aspects
gracefully and modestly do you have
great legs show them off with a cute

don't have that level of confidence yet
just fake it till you make it two The
Islander The Islander is energetic

unique Style just like Shakira and Nicki

because her spontaneous nature allows
for her to keep it interesting she
constantly has men on their toes Channel
your inner Islander by being adventurous
go do something you've always been
afraid to do but wanted to do anyway
such as rock climbing or
diving three the Regal it takes a strong
confident man to be with a Regal this
woman tends to be highly selective
reserved and well-mannered she is well
aware of what she desires and fully
knows that she will obtain it men find

the array of mystery she possesses and
they enjoy by the fact that she isn't
too easily available when they finally
win her over it's almost as if they've
obtained a diamond bring out your inel
Regal by simply listening 80% of the
time and talking only 20% of the time be
sincerely interested and ask questions
when you truly listen to a man you make
him feel that he's important to you and
you'll get a further glimpse into his
brain don't forget to add your own
insight and reveal some details of
yourself as well four the
entrepreneur the entrepreneur is a
career woman who wants to be a power
couple with her partner she is
intelligent independent and driven for
Success she will easily override passive
aggressive men and have no patience for
that a man needs to be successful
dominant and assertive in order to keep
up with her two famous entrepreneurs are
Oprah Winfrey and Hillary
Clinton the entrepreneur is attractive
to men because she's mentally
stimulating and can carry an educated
conversation she's driven and
continuously trying to improve men of
high social ranking look for women who
can keep up with them intellectually
since they enjoy discussing politics
philosophical ideas science the news and
such with their
Partners Channel your inner entrepreneur
by investing in self-growth and improve
Improvement whether that be to obtain a

establish new connections keep in mind
that everyone has improvements they can
strive to work on make a plan and set
out to follow it now that you know the
